name: brmo_meteor_detections
contamination_reasoning: Real-time meteor detections from radar networks. Future meteor arrivals are random.
difficulty_note: Highly stochastic event stream with diurnal and seasonal modulations but no deterministic pattern.
adapter_notes: Check for public API or scrape the BRMO network dashboard.
verify: Confirm the existence of a public API for the BRMO or similar meteor radar network.

name: raspberry_shake_station_velocity
contamination_reasoning: Distributed citizen-seismology network. Live velocity data is continuously generated.
difficulty_note: High-frequency seismic noise mixed with local and regional events. Requires denoising and event classification.
adapter_notes: Requires FDSNWS protocol support. Connect to the Raspberry Shake FDSN endpoint.
verify: Verify the FDSN endpoint URL and rate limits for Raspberry Shake.

name: queensland_health_emergency_surgery_waitlist
contamination_reasoning: Regional health data unlikely to be in global pretraining corpora.
difficulty_note: Waitlist lengths have complex seasonal trends and policy-driven regime shifts.
adapter_notes: Scrape the monthly performance reports. Format is HTML/PDF.
verify: Verify the exact URL and structure of the Queensland Health monthly reports.

name: aeso_alberta_power_market
contamination_reasoning: Live pool price and demand data. Future values are unseen.
difficulty_note: Highly volatile electricity prices with frequent spikes and regime shifts.
adapter_notes: Requires API key. Poll the report endpoint.
verify: Verify the existence and accessibility of the AESO public API.

name: eirgrid_smart_grid_dashboard
contamination_reasoning: Live Irish grid data. Future values are unseen.
difficulty_note: Small synchronous grid with high wind penetration, leading to high volatility and frequency excursions.

verify: Verify the exact URL and format of the EirGrid dashboard data.

name: glaciocast_lake_outburst_events
contamination_reasoning: Glacial lake outburst floods (GLOFs) are extreme, rare events. Future events are unseen.
difficulty_note: Rare event detection with no periodicity. Models must learn from precursor conditions rather than history.
adapter_notes: Check GDACS XML/RSS feeds for GLOF alerts. May require custom parsing.
verify: Verify if GDACS or a specific glaciology portal provides a real-time GLOF alert API.

name: dtcc_corporate_action_alerts
contamination_reasoning: Live event stream of corporate actions (dividends, splits, mergers). Future events cannot be in pretraining data.
difficulty_note: Event-driven arrival times with varying magnitudes. Requires modeling inter-arrival times and categorical impacts, defeating simple periodic baselines.
adapter_notes: Requires DTCC API key. Poll the corporate actions endpoint for new alerts. Format is JSON.
verify: Verify the existence and accessibility of the DTCC public API for corporate actions.
